_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including talent acquisition, onboarding design, performance management, career development planning, and succession preparation.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.586), LS-S-007 (LS, cosine: 0.581).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.579). Shared vocabulary: [developing, skill]. DCWF-only terms [intelligence, reports] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, ai, building, career, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.882 (P=0.917, R=0.850). P exceeds R by 0.067 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (91.0%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in developing intelligence reports." and "Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including ta". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.596 ≈ STS 0.579 (gap 0.016). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [developing, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [developing, skill]. DCWF-only: [intelligence, reports]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, ai, building, career, data, design].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 91.0% on Superset of classification. The matched KSA operates in a different professional domain than the obligation/competency requires. STS 0.579 passed the threshold but secondary signals contradict the match.
